title: potentilla × kelleri
intro: Potentilla × kelleri is a hybrid flowering plant, a cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla gracilis, known for its compact growth and vibrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla × kelleri include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system.
